title: Aurora, 01781, Archie Bear, 16In, Soft Toy, Brown
features: From Aurora's highly popular Teddy Bear Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable Teddy Bear with floppy body and legs
Children will love this soft and huggable Teddy Bear
description: This classic style Teddy bear is the perfect gift for anyone who loves teddies Archie bear makes a great gift for any occasion The bear has a gorgeous brown plush body which is so super soft you won't be able to stop cuddling him He has dark eyes a cute button nose and a floppy body Whether it is for a birthday baby shower or Christmas present this bear will impress Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products
